name: Southeast Sportsplex
about: Southeast Sportsplex is a premier sporting complex that offers a variety of athletic activities under one roof. The facility is equipped with golf simulators, indoor pickleball courts, batting cages, and a workout area. It provides a top-notch experience for sports enthusiasts of all skill levels, from beginners to seasoned players. The venue aims to create a welcoming environment where individuals can pursue their passion for sports and fitness. While the primary focus is on golf simulation and other sports, it does not explicitly operate as a bar or lounge.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulators with stunning realism and pinpoint accuracy
Ability to practice swing and play 18 holes on world-class courses in a weatherproof environment
Options for individual practice, playing with friends, or coaching to fine-tune form

food_and_drink.notes: Pizza is supplied during special events like the Friday Night Open Play Pickleball Social. Please call for more information on catering options for events.
No information is provided on-site alcohol service.

simulator_hardware.notes: The website mentions 'state-of-the-art golf simulators' but does not specify the brand or model.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own. It is recommended to call the venue at 774-425-2809 for more information on equipment policies.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue supplies pizza during special events. For general visits or private parties, it is recommended to call for their specific policy on outside food and drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes. The duration will depend on the number of players in your group and your pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Southeast Sportsplex is kid-friendly. They offer birthday party packages and a February Vacation Sports Camp, indicating they cater to children and teens.
